Appearances:
Plaintiff Shree Balji dba Cvic Center Hotel is present. Represented by Bibek Rawal
Attorney Chelsea Whelan appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Donald Cowden is present.
Attorney Stephen Berge representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JUL-23-2012 is vacated.
